text.title: QA Rollback Trigger Canon Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the qa-rollback-trigger-canon methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: derive-triggers
step.action: List candidate signals; pick ≤8 most predictive.

step.name: set-thresholds
step.action: Choose threshold + window per signal; avoid single-spike triggers.

step.name: assign-owners
step.action: Name a single owner per trigger.

step.name: wire-monitor
step.action: Translate each trigger to alert rule + action.

step.name: review
step.action: Adjust thresholds based on noise/miss tradeoff.
